subject: Fw: Some bedtime reading....just kidding!
body:
----- Forwarded Message -----
From: Emmy Tayler <emtayler@gmail.com>
To: J E <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, May 31, 2008 1:14 AM
Subject: Some bedtime reading....just kidding!


Jeffrey,
 
Attached is a PDF file explaining the technology. It is what we normally send to people wanting to purchase the machine. Hopefully it will answer some of your questions. I would love to hear what you think. 
 
We have had some unbelievable results (that I have witnessed personally also) and I think you are one of the few people smart enough to understand that this is the real deal. David's theory (and how he was able to create the machine) will answer some questions that even astrophysicists could benefit from. His actual theory is not in the info pack.
 
One of the people on our team was approached about the machine by the American Cancer Society in Hawaii. A meeting takes place on Tuesday. Very exciting news!
 
Anyway, I am heading to London on Wednesday from here in Huntington Beach but look forward to speaking with you soon.
 
Emmy
917 ██ ████
